title: Rocket Lab surges 34% in best day ever on revenue beat, record-setting launch deal
text: Rocket Lab surged 34% in its best day ever following the company's Q1 2026 earnings announcement. The company beat revenue expectations with $200.3 million in quarterly sales, up 63.5% year-over-year. The stock surge was driven by better-than-expected earnings, record backlog of $2.2 billion, and multiple strategic wins including defense contracts. CEO Peter Beck emphasized that the company is capturing major defense wins and achieving record operational metrics. The company signed 31 Electron and HASTE launch contracts plus five Neutron contracts during the quarter, far exceeding analyst expectations. The market's positive reaction reflected investor confidence in Rocket Lab's accelerating growth trajectory and defense market opportunity.
